title: Fondle! Daimidaler Goes Into Action!
overview: One day, pervy high school student Madanbashi Kouichi finds himself pursued by a mysterious beauty and a gang of strange penguins. On top of that, a giant robot starts rampaging through town! Could Kouichi's Hi-ERO particles be the key to saving the city?

title: Danger! The Stolen Sun
overview: Unable to reproduce the original burst of Hi-ERO particles, Kouichi must discover the true power of Eros to defeat his new enemy, Antarctic Number 9!

title: Menace! Fiery Jake Appears!
overview: A mysterious girl who loves penguins suddenly appears within the Penguin Empire. At the same time, Kouichi must become worthy to pilot Daimidaler.

title: Six's Challenge
overview: The Penguin Empire finally succeed infusing a penguin with Hi-ERO particles and Kyoko meets a mysterious and handsome stranger with no memories.

title: Mad Dance! The Fearsome Penguin Flyers
overview: A new robot, the Ritz Custom, appears after the Emperor discovers the secrets of Daimidaler. Will Kouichi be able to survive such a powerful foe?

title: Arrival! Shouma and Kiriko
overview: With Kouichi out of the picture, a new main character arrives. The Penguin Empire has almost grasped complete victory. Now, Kiriko must fall in love.

title: Hurrah! Antarctic Number 11 Appears
overview: Kiriko and Shouma must work together to take down Antarctic Number 11, but Shouma refuses to touch Kiriko anymore. He must find another way!

title: Convenient! Electric Toothbrush
overview: As Ritz and the others walk back to Penguin Castle, the Emperor continues testing the penguin particle device. Kiriko and Ritz face off, woman to woman!

title: Warning! The Closed Gate
overview: While dreaming of Ritz's past, we find out how far her penguin family is willing to go for her. They must put the Super Antarctic to good use!

title: Invoke! Joseph's Symbol
overview: As Kyoko's eyes begin to open, Kiriko's most valuable possession is taken away. Kiriko unleashes an attack against Ritz and the city behind her.

title: Distraction! The Emperor's Sexual Harassment
overview: Madanbashi Kouichi is back, and he's stronger than ever. Together, he and Kyoko are back in action, but what's the deal with Daimidaler's new upgrade?

title: Showdown! Sound Robots vs Daimidaler
overview: The final battle has begun. Now Beauty Salon Prince must partner with the Penguin Empire to defeat a whole new enemy?! Stand up and fight, Daimidaler!
